case_title: PLANET WINE INC. VS. BNJR, LLC (CA)

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,948.34 FILED BY PLANET WINE INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BNJR, LLC (CA) D.B.A. ASHBURY MARKET ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-19-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR SC-109 FILED BY PLAINTIFF PLANET WINE INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PLANET WINE INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BNJR, LLC (CA) D.B.A. ASHBURY MARKET $1,780.00 PRINCIPAL, $168.34 INTEREST, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,013.34 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $88.26 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT BNJR, LLC (CA) D.B.A. ASHBURY MARKET
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED - SERVED OCT-29-2013, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BNJR, LLC (CA) D.B.A. ASHBURY MARKET
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PLANET WINE INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-19-2013 - JUDGMENT.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF PLANET WINE INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BNJR, LLC (CA) D.B.A. ASHBURY MARKET

RETURN OF SMALL CLAIMS "NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT". SENT TO: DEFENDANT -BNJR,LLC. (ENVELOPE MARKED:RETURNED TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD; BNJR,LLC NOT AT THIS ADDRESS)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PLANET WINE INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BNJR, LLC (CA) D.B.A. ASHBURY MARKET

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-19-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-19-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY OLIVIER PICAULT--PRESIDENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $2,164.36 AS TO DEFENDANT BNJR, LLC (CA) D.B.A. ASHBURY MARKET
